title: Print items on dashboard
excerpt: Can we have an option to print out items under groups on our dash boards?

posts.author: BST-Newmark (Samira Young)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we have an option to print out items under groups on our dash boards?

posts.author: MurrayB (Murray)
posts.cookedHtml: this would help me especially if we are to truly use Monday.com as a CRM. We print ID Cards with a Unique Code for that individual.

posts.author: BST-Newmark (Samira Young)
posts.cookedHtml: The more people who click vote will motivate them to include the feature.
